response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a fan message slideshow for 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin'on Dreams'. 2. Identified the background vocal song as 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT. 3. Searched for official lyrics for 'Ridin' on Dreams' to resolve the metadata and obtain the full lyrics. 4. Structured the video into chronological scenes based on the slideshow progression. 5. Populated JSON with song information and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video is a slideshow showcasing fan-submitted messages for the 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin'on Dreams' event, set to a continuous background performance of the theme song 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT.

scenes.description: The video starts with an intro screen for the fan message slideshow, accompanied by the beginning of 'Ridin' on Dreams'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえ、君がいたからだよ
ねえ、ありがとうを何度も
今すぐに伝えたいんだ
さあ乗り込もう！ Ridin' on Dreams
Yeah！！

Wow oh oh…
Hey！！ (Hey！！) Hey！！ (Hey！！)
Yeah！！

あぁ 小さな夢から
想像できないような
想いになったんだ
わくわく止まらない！

何度迷ったって僕ら
絆が舵になる
ちょっとの不安だってさ
吹き飛ばせちゃうんだよ

果てない旅路を今
漕いでる途中に困難もあるでしょう
それも力に変えて
一緒に進むんだよ！

ねえ、君がいたからだよ
ねえ、夢では終われない
荒波も乗り越えていこう
“らしく” 輝いていたい

ねえ、君と会えたことが
ねえ、宝物だ から
手を取り合い 声かけ合って
地図など無い 未知の世界で
まだまだ行こう！ Ridin' on Dreams

Wow oh oh…
Hey！！ (Hey！！) Hey！！ (Hey！！)
Yeah！！

急な風が僕らの
行く先乱そうとも
あの日誓ったんだ
覚悟は揺るがない

ちゃんとしなきゃ！って背中
明日への橋になる
もっと大事にしなきゃね
“あたりまえ”は無いから

小さな船から始まるストーリー
どっから始めたらいいか
もがいて 少しずつね
輪になって 見つけた
何にも代えられない夢だ

Wow oh oh oh oh oh
未完成も愛して
Wow oh oh oh oh oh
想いは一つだ
Wow oh oh oh oh oh
僅かな希望でも
僕と 君で ずっと
馬鹿にされても 信じたい！

ねえ、ありがとうじゃ足りない
ねえ、想いが溢れちゃうんだよ
ずっと一緒だよ！

ねえ、君がいたからだよ
ねえ、夢では終われない
荒波も乗り越えていこう
“らしく” 輝いていたい

ねえ、君と会えたことが
ねえ、宝物だから
手を取り合い 声かけ合って
地図など無い 未知の世界で
まだまだ行けるから！

ひとりじゃない
何度でも立ち上がってさ
笑い合っていたい
願いだって みんなで、さあ！
手を繋いで 想像も超えて
まだまだ行こう！ Ridin' on Dreams

Wow oh oh…
Hey！！ (Hey！！) Hey！！ (Hey！！)
Yeah！！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Because you were there. Hey, thank you so many times I want to tell you now. Alright, let's get on board! Ridin' on Dreams Yeah!!
Wow oh oh… Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!) Yeah!!
Ah, from small dreams unimaginable It became a thought. Can't stop getting excited!
No matter how many times we get lost Bond becomes the rudder Even a little bit of unease is enough You can blow it away.
Now begins the endless journey There will be difficulties along the way. Turn that into strength. Let's move forward together!
It's because you were there. Hey, it can't end in a dream Let's overcome the rough waves together. want to shine like 'ra sugi'
Hey, meeting you Hey, it's a treasure, you know. holding hands and calling out to each other No maps, in an unknown world Let's go further! Ridin' on Dreams
Wow oh oh… Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!) Yeah!!
A sudden gust of wind hit us No matter how chaotic the journey ahead I made a vow that day My resolve is unwavering.
You have to do it properly! said to my back A bridge to tomorrow I need to be more careful. There's no 'go with the flow'
A story that begins with a small boat Where should I start? Struggling. bit by bit, we formed a circle and found it an irreplaceable dream
Wow oh oh oh oh oh Love the unfinished too Wow oh oh oh oh oh The thoughts are one. Wow oh oh oh oh oh Even a glimmer of hope Just the two of us forever even if mocked I want to believe!
Hey, it's not just a matter of saying thanks Hey, my heart is overflowing with feelings. Forever together!
It's because you were there Hey, it can't end in a dream Let's ride over the rough waves. 'ra suga' kagayaitai
Hey, meeting you was Hey, it's a treasure, you know. holding hands and calling out to each other No maps, in an unknown world We can still go further!
not alone Stand up again and again laughing together Wish too, everyone, come on! Hold hands and go beyond imagination Let's go further! Ridin' on Dreams
Wow oh oh… Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!) Yeah!!

scenes.description: The slideshow continues with fan messages, with 'Ridin' on Dreams' playing as background music.
